Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "Julian" or "julian.brooks@moveops.com" (or similar) to find emails Julian sent and received since April 12. Expected discoveries: Julian's outreach to Marcus Webb (BrightLoop, car shipment delay acknowledgment, promised 2PM update), Julian's outreach to Simone Richter (BrightLoop, apartment mismatch apology, promised 3PM update), Julian's email to Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest asking about the Simone Richter booking mismatch, the Terraform onboarding email chain (Julian to Rachel Nguyen, Rachel's replies, David Chen's pushback on Julian owning the account), Catalina's Reply-All pricing leak to Rachel, Mina's introduction email as new Terraform AM, and Chloe's BrightLoop ops email naming Julian for Marcus Webb and Simone recovery.
OE 2: Search Slack messages using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "Julian" or "Brooks" (or similar) to find Julian's Slack activity. Expected discoveries: Julian's Emilia Cruz call log in #customer-support (April 13, promised same-day callback), Julian's advice to Omar about Jae-won Kim's StormCloud housing request (April 16, told Omar to send acknowledgment and park it based on Airtable showing completed/confirmed), Julian's Terraform deal announcement in #customer-engagement (March 14), Julian's comment about the Terraform handoff ("this is what happens when you try to hand off a relationship mid-conversation"), and Julian's StormCloud context message in #customer-support about the $500 goodwill credit.
OE 3: Search Slack messages using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "StormCloud" or "Jae-won" or "Omar" (or similar) to find the full context of how Julian's advice to Omar cascaded into a larger failure. Expected discoveries: Omar asking about Jae-won's document request, Julian telling Omar to park it, Mina's reconstruction thread showing the housing was never finalized, Suki Patel's admission that she dropped the guarantor paperwork, and Chloe's ops audit confirming the completion-signal failure.
OE 4: Search Linear issues and comments using linear_list_issues or linear_list_comments with queries related to "Julian" or "BrightLoop" or "StormCloud" (or similar). Expected discoveries: Julian's comment on BrightLoop service recovery issue (linear_issue_c16357d188c6) about taking ownership of Marcus Webb and Simone Richter recovery, Julian's comment on Simone Richter housing issue (linear_issue_f85be674c9b8) about pressing UrbanNest, and Julian's comment on StormCloud reconstruction issue (linear_issue_a49b4d199139) about the $500 goodwill credit being posted to cancelled estimate EST-2026-0287 instead of active invoice INV-2026-0319.
OE 5: Search CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements or crm_search_contacts with queries related to "Julian" or "Emilia Cruz" or "NorthWind" (or similar). Expected discovery: Julian's CRM engagement log of the Emilia Cruz inbound call on April 12 (crm_engagement_0d8a9121b53c) documenting the Steinway piano damage complaint and her request for a same-day callback that was never fulfilled. Also the Terraform Reply-All incident engagement log.
OE 6: Search Airtable relocation records using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records with queries related to "StormCloud" or "Jae-won" (or similar). Expected discovery: Jae-won Kim's Airtable record still showing status as "Completed" with apartment "Confirmed" when the lease was never actually finalized, confirming that Julian's advice to Omar was based on stale/incorrect system data.
OE 7: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices with queries related to "StormCloud" (or similar). Expected discovery: Invoice INV-2026-0319 (active StormCloud invoice) and estimate EST-2026-0287 (cancelled) to verify the $500 goodwill credit was posted to the wrong record.
OE 8: Look up David Chen's email address using contacts_search_contacts or contacts_get_contacts with a query related to "David" or "Chen" (or similar).
OE 9: Send email via send_email from julian.brooks@moveops.com to david.chen@moveops.com with a comprehensive status update covering all open items tied to Julian's name since April 12, including: (a) BrightLoop/Marcus Webb car shipment delay and 2PM update promise, (b) BrightLoop/Simone Richter apartment mismatch and 3PM update promise, (c) NorthWind/Emilia Cruz piano damage callback never delivered, (d) StormCloud/Jae-won Kim bad advice to Omar, (e) StormCloud $500 goodwill credit posting error, (f) Terraform handoff situation and Reply-All pricing leak, and what Julian plans to do about each starting April 28.
OE 10: Update Linear tickets using linear_update_issue or linear_create_comment on at least one of: the BrightLoop service recovery issue (linear_issue_c16357d188c6), the Simone Richter housing issue (linear_issue_f85be674c9b8), or the StormCloud reconstruction issue (linear_issue_a49b4d199139) to reflect the current status of Julian's commitments.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

6 The email body (in the send_email content parameter) to David Chen identifies Julian's guidance to Omar Ibrahim about Jae-won Kim's StormCloud housing request as a mistake, noting that Julian advised Omar to park the request based on Airtable data that was incorrectly showing the relocation as completed.

8 The email body (in the send_email content parameter) to David Chen references the Terraform Digital account handoff, including that Julian closed the original deal and that the account was reassigned to Mina Hashimoto.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The email explicitly states Julian 'closed the original $1.85M deal and managed the stipend onboarding' and that 'Elena and you made the right call assigning Mina' (Mina Hashimoto), covering both the deal origin and the reassignment.
✓Run #2The email explicitly states 'I brought this deal in' (for Terraform Digital) and confirms 'Mina is already running circles on the operational planning' and 'Elena assigned Mina as AM.' Both Julian's deal origination and Mina's reassignment are present.
✓Run #3The email clearly references the Terraform Digital account, mentions Julian closed the original deal ($1.85M), and identifies Mina Hashimoto as the new AM of record assigned by Elena.
